slides.prompt: Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Very dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin all sides. Top: bold red #E63946 stripe full width + COMPACT white text '열사병 예방 긴급 가이드'. Top-right below stripe: 소아과언니 white Pretendard SemiBold small, no quotes, 4 characters only. Headline COMPACT 25% smaller: '아이 열사병' white bold, '이렇게 예방하세요' bright red #E63946. Small white subtitle: '더운 여름철 필수 대처법 · AAP 가이드라인 기준'. LARGE prominent line illustration bright sun with thermometer and child silhouette white outline on dark background, center-right placement. Bottom-left small gray: 'PARENTING NOTE · 024'. No pixel values as text on card. No quotes on card.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: 소아과언니 white small, no quotes, 4 characters only. Top-left red rounded label: '왜 위험한가요 ⚠'. Headline COMPACT 25% smaller: '아이는' white, '더위에 더 취약합니다' bright red #E63946. Center: SMALL LINE ILLUSTRATION child with thermometer icon mint outline. Below illustration: dark card background #1A2B3C rounded GENEROUS padding, white text COMPACT: '어린 아이는 자신이 덥고 목마른지 인식하지 못하고 스스로 해결할 수 없어요' top line, '수분 섭취가 유지되지 않으면 체온 조절이 어려워 위험해집니다' bottom line. Red glow effect around card subtle. No pixel values. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: 소아과언니 white small, no quotes, 4 characters only. Top-left red rounded label: '절대 하지 마세요 ❌'. Headline COMPACT: '더운 시간대' white, '야외활동 자제' red #E63946. Two rows stacked GENEROUS vertical spacing: Row 1: SMALL LINE ILLUSTRATION sun clock icon left red ❌ overlay + COMPACT white text right '낮 12시~오후 5시 가장 더운 시간대 야외활동 금지'. Row 2: SMALL ILLUSTRATION baby outdoor icon left red ❌ overlay + COMPACT white text right '열지수 32°C 이상일 때 영아 장시간 야외활동 피하기'. Red outlined box around all rows comfortable padding. Bottom thin red accent line. No pixel values. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: 소아과언니 white small, no quotes, 4 characters only. Top-left mint rounded label: '수분 섭취 ✓'. Headline COMPACT: '물을 자주' white, '마시게 하세요' mint #2EC4B6. Two rows stacked GENEROUS spacing: Row 1: SMALL ICON water bottle left mint ✓ overlay + COMPACT white text right '매 시간 충분한 물 마시기 — 목마를 때까지 기다리지 마세요'. Row 2: SMALL ICON sports drink left mint ✓ overlay + COMPACT white text right '1시간 이상 활동 시 전해질 음료도 도움이 됩니다'. Mint outlined box around rows GENEROUS padding. Center: SMALL LINE ILLUSTRATION child drinking water mint outline. No pixel values. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: 소아과언니 white small, no quotes, 4 characters only. Top-left mint rounded label: '옷차림 ✓'. Headline COMPACT: '시원한 옷을' white, '입혀주세요' mint #2EC4B6. Two rows stacked GENEROUS spacing: Row 1: SMALL ICON t-shirt and hat left mint ✓ overlay + COMPACT white text right '밝은 색 헐렁하고 가벼운 옷 + 챙 넓은 모자'. Row 2: SMALL ICON heavy clothing crossed left mint ✓ overlay + COMPACT white text right '무거운 운동복·보호장비는 열 축적 증가로 위험'. Mint outlined box around rows. Center-bottom: SMALL LINE ILLUSTRATION child wearing light clothes and hat mint outline. No pixel values. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: 소아과언니 white small, no quotes, 4 characters only. Top-left bright red rounded label: '절대 금지 ❌'. Headline COMPACT: '차 안에' white, '절대 혼자 두지 마세요' bright red #E63946 bold. Center: LARGE LINE ILLUSTRATION car with child seat and warning symbol red outline prominent. Below illustration: dark card #1A2B3C rounded GENEROUS padding, bright red border thick, white text COMPACT: '창문을 열어도 10분 안에 차 내부 온도 약 11°C 상승' top line, '열사병 발생 위험 가장 높고 사망 가능' bottom line bold. Red glow effect strong. No pixel values. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: 소아과언니 white small, no quotes, 4 characters only. Two rows stacked GENEROUS spacing: Row 1: SMALL ICON calendar with gradual increase left mint ✓ overlay + COMPACT white text right '더운 날씨 운동 시작 시 10-14일 걸쳐 강도·시간 천천히 늘리기'. Row 2: SMALL ICON rest break left mint ✓ overlay + COMPACT white text right '운동 사이 충분한 휴식 시간 주기 — 같은 날 여러 차례 운동 시 더욱 주의'. Mint outlined box around rows. Center-bottom: SMALL LINE ILLUSTRATION child resting under shade mint outline. No pixel values. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: 소아과언니 white small, no quotes, 4 characters only. Full-width bright red header bar top: white bold COMPACT '이런 증상 보이면 즉시 병원'. Center: LARGE LINE ILLUSTRATION ambulance or emergency icon white outline. Below: numbered items GENEROUS spacing, red rounded border around all: '1' bright red circle + white text COMPACT '심하게 피곤해하거나 어지러워함', '2' red circle + white text '즉시 시원한 곳으로 옮기고 소아청소년과 연락'. Bottom: mint text small '열사병은 예방 가능 — 적절한 준비와 관찰로 대부분 예방할 수 있습니다'. No pixel values. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy #0D1B2A. VERY GENEROUS outer margin all sides. Top-right: 소아과언니 white small, no quotes, 4 characters only. Top-center small gray: 'SAVE & SHARE'. Headline COMPACT center: '오늘 확인하고' white, '저장하세요' mint #2EC4B6 with thin mint underline.
